name: create_association
description: Add a cds.Association to an existing deployed view (SV_ or GV_) so it can navigate to a master-data view. Implements the four-step CSN protocol: (1) @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association on the FK field, (2) association element in elements with bare refs, (3) association ref in query.SELECT.columns, (4) association in query.SELECT.mixin with $projection refs. Supports both single-key and compound-key targets. Fetches source view CSN automatically. Returns a dry-run by default; set deploy=true to apply.

target_view.description: Association target view technical name (e.g. V_I_COMPANYCODE). The association element name is derived as '_' + first 9 chars of this name.

join_fields.description: Join field pairs for the association. Use one entry for single-key targets; use multiple entries (in key order) for compound-key targets. Overrides join_field_source / join_field_target when provided.

source_field.description: Foreign key column on the source view (e.g. CompanyCode).

target_field.description: Matching primary key column on the target view (e.g. CompanyCode).

join_field_source.description: Shorthand for single-key: foreign key column on the source view. Ignored when join_fields is provided.

join_field_target.description: Shorthand for single-key: primary key column on the target view. Ignored when join_fields is provided.

target_label.description: Human-readable label of the target view used in the association @EndUserText.label (e.g. 'Company code'). Defaults to the target_view technical name if omitted.

deploy.description: Set true to deploy after dry-run review. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.
